MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied without prejudice; there is no record that defendant ever filed an answer to the complaint. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
